name: Prompt Library Gardener
description: Clean, tag, and index a user-provided prompt collection so the right prompt can be found, reused, and improved quickly.
use_cases: Turn a user-provided list of saved prompts into a tagged reusable library.
Group prompts by job, workflow, audience, and output format.
Trim duplicates and near-duplicates without losing useful variants.
Create naming rules, reuse notes, and an index for fast retrieval.
